components.name: GraphQL Schema
components.description: All GraphQL type definitions and resolver implementations organized by domain (feeds, posts, users, squads, comments, notifications, etc.).

components.name: Entity Layer
components.description: TypeORM entity classes for all domain objects; used by resolvers and workers to query and persist data.

components.name: REST Routes
components.description: Fastify REST route handlers for RSS feeds, devcards, webhooks (Paddle, Stripe), boot endpoint, user management, and public API.

components.name: Auth Middleware
components.description: JWT verification and session context injection for every incoming request.

components.name: Common Utilities
components.description: Shared helpers for notifications, mailing, content preferences, feed generation, Pub/Sub messaging, and domain utilities.

components.name: Integration Clients
components.description: Typed client wrappers for internal microservices: bragi (content), freyja (AI/media), snotra (search), mimir (recommendations), lofn (messaging), skadi (feed scoring), feed, linear, anthropic, automation.

components.name: GraphORM
components.description: Internal bridge layer that translates GraphQL query field selections into optimized TypeORM queries, avoiding N+1 fetches.

components.name: Worker Handlers
components.description: Individual Pub/Sub message handlers for domain events: reputation changes, CDC replication, notification dispatch, digest emails, image cleanup, user sync.

components.name: Notification Workers
components.description: Specialized handlers for in-app, email, and push notification delivery triggered by user interaction events.

components.name: Cron Jobs
components.description: Named periodic job handlers for maintenance tasks (digest sending, streak updates, data cleanup).

relationships.description: Resolvers query and mutate domain entities via TypeORM
Uses GraphORM to build optimized TypeORM queries from GQL field selections
Calls internal microservice clients for recommendations, search, and content
Uses shared notification helpers and domain utilities
REST handlers read domain entities for RSS and devcards
TypeORM executes SQL queries against master and read-replica
Injects user context before resolvers execute
Workers share entity definitions to query the same database
